CustomField.description: ‌Minimum Asset Value for Insurance purposes. If higher than Agreed Value, then Insurance Top-up will show up on the schedule level - Lessor has to cover the difference with the own insurance
CustomField.inlineHelpText: ‌Minimum Asset Value for Insurance purposes. If higher than Agreed Value, then Insurance Top-up will show up on the schedule level - Lessor has to cover the difference with the own insurance
CustomField.label: Minimum Insurance Requirement
